notes: Expanded monthly issue deck, reviewed for variety and impact. Removed 24 mechanically-duplicate filler issues that reused the same four boilerplate options with only flavour text changed. Added 22 new GOVERNMENT issues and 22 new OPPOSITION/THIRD_PARTY issues covering major party-defining events: a new leader emerging, a major scandal, MLA/leader defections in both directions, a film star joining the party, municipal/by-election wins and losses, national-award image boosts, viral speeches and sting videos, coalition strain, central-agency raids, and the death of the party's Vice President (which reliably drops morale, spikes public support via the sympathy wave, and brings in coins through condolence donations). Each new issue has its own distinct option set rather than reusing the original four boilerplate option templates. Not yet imported to Mongo. | SECOND EXPANSION: added another 70 GOVERNMENT and 70 OPPOSITION/THIRD_PARTY issues across 70 distinct archetypes -- rumours, fake media/bluff stories, on-camera goof-ups, business opportunities/investment pledges, deepfake video and audio scandals, AI-clone impersonation bots, social-media hacks, mystery donor windfalls, viral memes/dance reels/challenges, game-show and reality-show appearances, comedian roasts, hot-mic moments, leaked chats/drafts, debate challenges, fact-check clashes, old tweet/video resurfacing, lifestyle optics rows, sporting glory, magazine covers, fan clubs, satirical murals, and more -- so no two months should feel alike. Each archetype has its own unique option set (no shared boilerplate).

deckRules.selection: Backend rotates through active role-allowed issues per party, so each party sees every issue in its role pool before repeats.

issueItems.title: A leaked internal WhatsApp chat embarrasses the opposition
issueItems.description: Screenshots from an internal opposition group, full of unflattering remarks about allies and supporters, have leaked online.

options.text: Issue a public apology and discipline those responsible.
Claim the screenshots were selectively edited or fabricated.

risk.badOutcome: The original, unedited messages surface, proving the claim false.

options.text: Quietly tighten internal communication protocols going forward.
Dismiss it as harmless private banter blown out of proportion.

issueItems.title: A popular TV astrologer's election prediction goes viral
issueItems.description: A well-known astrologer has predicted a dramatic outcome for the ruling party, and clips of the prediction are being shared everywhere.

options.text: Publicly welcome the prediction as a sign of confidence.
Dismiss astrology as having no place in serious politics.
Avoid commenting either way on the prediction.
Quietly arrange for a rival astrologer to offer a more favourable counter-prediction.

risk.badOutcome: The obvious counter-prediction stunt draws public ridicule.

issueItems.title: A popular TV astrologer's prediction about the opposition goes viral
issueItems.description: A well-known astrologer has made a dramatic prediction about the opposition's prospects, and it's the talk of every panel show.

options.text: Publicly welcome the prediction as a sign of momentum.
Dismiss astrology as having no place in serious politics.
Avoid commenting either way on the prediction.
Quietly arrange for a rival astrologer to offer a more favourable counter-prediction.

risk.badOutcome: The obvious stunt draws public ridicule.

issueItems.title: A high-profile foreign investor delegation tours the state
issueItems.description: A delegation from an Asian manufacturing hub is evaluating potential sites in the state against other competing states.

options.text: Organise a lavish, highly visible welcome with top leadership personally hosting.

delayedEffects.commentary: Word gets back that the delegation was genuinely impressed.

options.text: Keep the visit professional and low-key, letting officials handle logistics.
Offer an aggressive tax-break package to win the delegation over.

risk.badOutcome: Critics question why incentives weren't offered to local industry first.

options.text: Treat it as a routine visit without any special effort.

risk.badOutcome: The delegation later signs with a rival state that made more effort.

issueItems.title: Opposition leaders hold a closed-door meeting with a visiting investor delegation
issueItems.description: The opposition has arranged a private meeting with a touring foreign investor delegation, eager to pitch an alternative governance vision.

options.text: Publicise the meeting widely as proof of credible alternative leadership.

risk.badOutcome: The ruling party dismisses it as a photo-op with no real substance.

options.text: Keep the meeting private and avoid making it a media event.
Present a detailed, costed policy pitch to genuinely impress the delegation.
Decline the meeting, wary of optics around dealing with corporate interests.

issueItems.title: A popular stand-up comedian roasts the government on national TV
issueItems.description: A widely watched comedy special spends ten brutal minutes mocking the ruling party's recent decisions, and the clips are spreading fast.

options.text: Have a senior spokesperson publicly say the jokes were fair game and even funny.
Send the comedian's production house a legal notice over 'defamatory' content.

risk.badOutcome: The notice is mocked as thin-skinned and the comedian gets even more views.

options.text: Quietly invite the comedian for tea, hoping to soften future material.

risk.badOutcome: The 'friendly chat' itself leaks and is read as an attempt at pressure.

options.text: Make no comment and let the special's news cycle pass.

issueItems.title: A popular stand-up comedian roasts the opposition on national TV
issueItems.description: A widely watched comedy special spends ten brutal minutes mocking the opposition's recent missteps, and the clips are spreading fast.

options.text: Have a senior leader publicly say the jokes were fair game and even funny.
Send the comedian's production house a legal notice over 'defamatory' content.

risk.badOutcome: The notice is mocked as thin-skinned and the comedian gets even more views.

options.text: Quietly invite the comedian for tea, hoping to soften future material.

risk.badOutcome: The 'friendly chat' leaks and is read as an attempt at pressure.

options.text: Make no comment and let the special's news cycle pass.

issueItems.title: A minister's expensive watch sparks a lifestyle controversy
issueItems.description: Photos of a senior minister wearing a luxury watch worth several times their declared annual income are circulating online.

options.text: Issue a statement saying the watch was a long-held family gift, not a recent purchase.

risk.badOutcome: Reporters find the watch's exact retail listing, undercutting the gift claim.

options.text: Voluntarily disclose the minister's full asset and income details for transparency.
Quietly ask the minister to avoid flashy appearances for a while.
Publicly dismiss the entire controversy as a non-issue and media overreach.

issueItems.title: An opposition leader's lavish vacation photos go viral
issueItems.description: Photos of a senior opposition leader on an expensive overseas holiday are circulating, awkward timing given the party's pro-poor messaging.

options.text: Say the trip was booked long ago and has nothing to do with current politics.

risk.badOutcome: Old social posts contradict the timeline, deepening the row.

options.text: Voluntarily disclose who funded the trip for full transparency.
Quietly ask the leader to avoid flashy appearances for a while.
Publicly dismiss the entire controversy as irrelevant media noise.

issueItems.title: A fake WhatsApp forward about a government scheme spreads in villages
issueItems.description: A widely circulated forward falsely claims a welfare scheme has been quietly cancelled, causing real panic among beneficiaries.

options.text: Send a mass SMS/IVR campaign to beneficiaries clarifying the scheme is active.
Send local leaders door-to-door in affected villages to personally clarify the facts.
Issue a single press clarification and assume it will filter down.

risk.badOutcome: The forward keeps spreading faster than the official clarification.

options.text: Report the forward to the messaging platform for fact-check labelling.

issueItems.title: A fake WhatsApp forward falsely claims the opposition has quit a key alliance
issueItems.description: A widely circulated forward falsely claims the opposition has walked out of a popular local alliance, confusing supporters.

options.text: Send a mass SMS clarification to supporters confirming the alliance is intact.
Send local leaders door-to-door to personally clarify the facts.
Issue a single press clarification and assume it will filter down.

risk.badOutcome: The fake forward keeps spreading faster than the clarification.

options.text: Report the forward to the messaging platform for fact-check labelling.

issueItems.title: A viral video shows a minister's personal aide misbehaving with the public
issueItems.description: A bystander's video shows a minister's aide shouting and shoving a member of the public at a government office, and it's spreading fast.

options.text: Suspend the aide immediately and issue a public apology to the affected citizen.
Issue a private warning to the aide without any public action.

risk.badOutcome: A second video of the same aide surfaces, deepening the embarrassment.

options.text: Claim the citizen provoked the aide and the video lacks context.

risk.badOutcome: A longer version of the video disproves the provocation claim.

options.text: Personally compensate the affected citizen and arrange a public reconciliation.

issueItems.title: A viral video shows an opposition leader's security staff misbehaving with reporters
issueItems.description: A bystander's video shows a senior leader's security staff roughly shoving a journalist outside a public event.

options.text: Suspend the staffer immediately and apologise to the journalist publicly.
Issue a private warning without any public action.

risk.badOutcome: A second clip of the same staffer surfaces, deepening the embarrassment.

options.text: Claim the reporter provoked the staffer and the video lacks context.

risk.badOutcome: A fuller version of the video disproves the provocation claim.

options.text: Arrange a public apology and reconciliation with the journalist.

issueItems.title: The state's young athlete wins a major international medal
issueItems.description: A state-sponsored athlete has won a stunning medal at an international meet, and everyone wants a share of the credit.

options.text: Host a grand state felicitation ceremony with cash reward and a government job offer.
Send a modest congratulatory note without a big public event.
Loudly credit the state's sports scheme as the reason for the win.

risk.badOutcome: The athlete's coach publicly says the scheme had little to do with the win.

options.text: Announce a new training academy named after the athlete's achievement.

issueItems.title: A local sports academy alumnus wins international glory
issueItems.description: An athlete who trained at a community sports academy the opposition has long championed wins a big international medal.

options.text: Host a public felicitation event highlighting the academy's grassroots support.
Send a modest congratulatory note without a big public event.
Loudly credit years of grassroots advocacy for sports infrastructure.

risk.badOutcome: The athlete's coach says government, not opposition, funded the actual training.

options.text: Pledge to expand such community academies if elected.

issueItems.title: A new film's plot is widely read as a thinly veiled critique of the government
issueItems.description: A big-budget film releasing this month features a corrupt fictional state government that audiences are reading as a clear stand-in for the real one.

options.text: Publicly call it fiction and refuse to engage with the comparison.
Ask the censor board to review certain 'defamatory' scenes before release.

risk.badOutcome: The review request is read as government overreach into art, drawing backlash.

options.text: Commission a glossy documentary showcasing the government's achievements to counter the narrative.
Invite the filmmaker for a public dialogue to discuss governance constructively.

issueItems.title: A new film's hero is widely read as inspired by an opposition leader
issueItems.description: A big-budget film's idealistic young politician character is being read by audiences as clearly modelled on a rising opposition leader.

options.text: Publicly embrace the flattering comparison and amplify it.

risk.badOutcome: Critics accuse the party of manufacturing the comparison for publicity.

options.text: Make no official comment and let audiences draw their own conclusions.
Invite the filmmaker for a public dialogue on the issues raised in the film.
Distance the leader from the comparison, calling it purely coincidental.

issueItems.title: A popular reality talent show invites the CM as a guest judge for one episode
issueItems.description: A massively watched singing/dance reality show wants the Chief Minister to appear as a special guest judge for a special episode.

options.text: Accept and play it warm and encouraging toward the young contestants.
Accept but insist on judging strictly and fairly, even if it disappoints contestants.

risk.badOutcome: A harsh comment toward a popular contestant draws online backlash.

options.text: Decline, citing the need to stay neutral and avoid favouritism optics.
Send the culture minister instead, keeping the top leader out of it.

issueItems.title: A popular reality talent show invites the opposition leader as a guest judge
issueItems.description: A massively watched talent show wants the opposition's top leader to appear as a guest judge for one special episode.

options.text: Accept and be warm and encouraging toward the contestants on screen.
Accept but judge strictly and honestly, even if it upsets fans of a contestant.

risk.badOutcome: A harsh comment toward a popular contestant draws online backlash.

options.text: Decline, citing a need to stay focused on serious political work.
Send a popular youth leader instead, testing their public appeal.

issueItems.title: An anonymous donor gives the party a massive, unexpected contribution
issueItems.description: A single anonymous donation, far larger than usual, has landed in the party's accounts overnight -- a welcome surprise with no clear source.

options.text: Accept the funds and voluntarily disclose the amount, though not the identity.
Accept the funds quietly without any public disclosure.

risk.badOutcome: Investigative journalists trace the donation to a controversial business group.

options.text: Hold the funds in escrow pending verification of the donor's identity.
Accept the funds but publicly donate a portion to charity to manage optics.

issueItems.title: An anonymous donor gives the opposition a massive, unexpected contribution
issueItems.description: A single anonymous donation, far larger than usual, has landed in the party's accounts overnight, with no clear source attached.

options.text: Accept the funds and voluntarily disclose the amount, though not the identity.
Accept the funds quietly without any public disclosure.

risk.badOutcome: Journalists trace the donation to a business group with ties to the ruling party.

options.text: Hold the funds in escrow pending verification of the donor's identity.
Accept the funds but publicly donate a portion to charity to manage optics.

issueItems.title: An old college-era video of a minister resurfaces online
issueItems.description: A grainy, decades-old video of a now-senior minister making an embarrassingly naive political statement as a student has resurfaced.

options.text: Have the minister publicly laugh it off as the naivety of youth.
Issue a formal apology distancing the minister's current views from the old statement.
Claim the video has been altered or is being misrepresented.

risk.badOutcome: Original, unedited footage from the same event surfaces, disproving the claim.

options.text: Make no comment and let the story fade on its own.

issueItems.title: An old video of an opposition leader praising a now-rival party resurfaces
issueItems.description: A years-old clip shows a senior opposition leader warmly praising the ruling party before switching sides, and it's making the rounds again.

options.text: Publicly explain how circumstances and the political landscape have genuinely changed.
Issue a formal statement distancing current views from the old remarks.
Claim the video has been selectively edited or misrepresented.

risk.badOutcome: The original, full footage surfaces, disproving the claim.

options.text: Make no comment and let the story fade on its own.

issueItems.title: A young party leader's dance reel at a local festival goes massively viral
issueItems.description: A short clip of a young government leader dancing enthusiastically at a local festival has exploded online, racking up millions of views.

options.text: Share it widely from official handles, leaning into the relatable, fun image.

risk.badOutcome: Critics call it frivolous given ongoing serious issues in the state.

options.text: Let the clip spread naturally without official amplification.
Quietly ask the leader to avoid such viral moments going forward.
Launch an official dance challenge inviting citizens to join in.

issueItems.title: A young opposition leader's dance reel at a rally goes massively viral
issueItems.description: A short clip of a young opposition leader dancing energetically at a rally has exploded online, racking up millions of views.

options.text: Share it widely from official handles, leaning into the relatable, fun image.

risk.badOutcome: Critics call it frivolous given the seriousness of campaign issues.

options.text: Let the clip spread naturally without official amplification.
Quietly ask the leader to avoid such viral moments going forward.
Launch an official dance challenge inviting supporters to join in.

issueItems.title: An AI chatbot cloned to sound like the CM spreads fake statements
issueItems.description: A rogue AI voice-clone, trained to mimic the Chief Minister's speech patterns, is being used to post fake 'statements' that are fooling some users.

options.text: Issue an urgent public warning that the voice clone is fake, with examples of the differences.
Pursue legal action against whoever created and is operating the bot.
Avoid public comment to prevent further panic or attention.

risk.badOutcome: More fake clips circulate unchecked, deepening confusion.

options.text: Push citizens hard toward an official verified channel for all real statements going forward.

issueItems.title: An AI chatbot cloned to sound like the opposition leader spreads fake statements
issueItems.description: A rogue AI voice-clone mimicking the opposition leader's speech is being used to post fake 'statements' that are fooling some users.

options.text: Issue an urgent public warning that the voice clone is fake, with clear examples.
Pursue legal action against whoever created and is operating the bot.
Avoid public comment to prevent further panic or attention.

risk.badOutcome: More fake clips circulate unchecked, deepening confusion.

options.text: Push supporters hard toward an official verified channel for all real statements.

issueItems.title: The party's official social media account is hacked
issueItems.description: Unknown hackers briefly took over the party's main social media account and posted strange, off-brand messages before access was restored.

options.text: Publish a transparent account of exactly what happened and what's being done about it.
Quietly delete the posts and say nothing official about the incident.

risk.badOutcome: Screenshots of the hacked posts keep resurfacing despite the deletion.

options.text: Suggest, without proof, that a rival party orchestrated the hack.

risk.badOutcome: The unsupported accusation is called out as a baseless deflection.

options.text: Publicly announce a significant upgrade to the party's digital security.

issueItems.title: A fast-growing startup announces it is moving its headquarters to the state
issueItems.description: A well-funded tech startup, recently valued in the billions, says it is relocating its headquarters to the state capital, citing a favourable business climate.

options.text: Celebrate it loudly as living proof the government's business-friendly policies are working.
Quietly offer additional incentives to lock in the relocation and attract more like it.
Treat it as routine economic news without much fanfare.
Host a glossy signing ceremony with the startup's founders alongside top leadership.

issueItems.title: A fast-growing startup founder publicly praises the opposition's economic ideas
issueItems.description: A well-known startup founder, in a widely shared interview, credits the opposition's policy proposals as the kind of thinking the state needs.

options.text: Celebrate the praise loudly as proof the opposition's economic vision resonates with innovators.
Invite the founder for a formal policy consultation to deepen the relationship.
Treat it as routine news without much fanfare.
Host a public fireside chat between the founder and the party's top leader.

issueItems.title: An independent think-tank ranks the state poorly on a key development index
issueItems.description: A respected national think-tank has released a report ranking the state near the bottom on a closely watched development index.

options.text: Commission an independent rebuttal analysis challenging the report's methodology.
Acknowledge the gaps honestly and pledge specific, time-bound corrective action.
Publicly dismiss the think-tank as biased or politically motivated.

risk.badOutcome: The think-tank's credentials hold up under scrutiny, deepening the embarrassment.

options.text: Highlight other, more favourable rankings the state has scored well on.

issueItems.title: An independent survey ranks public trust in the opposition at a multi-year low
issueItems.description: A respected national survey shows public trust in the opposition has slipped to its lowest level in years.

options.text: Commission an independent rebuttal challenging the survey's methodology and sample.
Acknowledge the trust gap honestly and pledge concrete internal reforms.
Publicly dismiss the survey as biased or commissioned by rivals.

risk.badOutcome: The survey's methodology holds up under scrutiny, deepening the embarrassment.

options.text: Highlight other, more favourable surveys the party has scored well on.

issueItems.title: A viral clip shows a minister dozing off during a public event
issueItems.description: A clip of a senior minister visibly nodding off during a long public ceremony has gone viral, sparking jokes about overwork or disinterest.

options.text: Have the minister joke publicly about the punishing schedule that led to the moment.
Insist it was just a blink caught at an unfortunate angle.

risk.badOutcome: A longer version of the clip clearly shows extended dozing, undercutting the claim.

options.text: Make no comment and let the joke run its course.
Have the minister announce a routine health checkup to show the moment was taken seriously.

issueItems.title: A viral clip shows an opposition leader dozing off during a long meeting
issueItems.description: A clip of a senior opposition leader nodding off during a lengthy strategy meeting livestream has gone viral, sparking jokes online.

options.text: Have the leader joke publicly about the gruelling campaign schedule.
Insist it was just a blink caught at an unfortunate angle.

risk.badOutcome: A longer clip clearly shows extended dozing, undercutting the claim.

options.text: Make no comment and let the joke run its course.
Have the leader announce a routine health checkup to show it's being taken seriously.

issueItems.title: The opposition publicly challenges the CM to a televised debate
issueItems.description: In a widely shared video, the opposition leader dares the Chief Minister to a head-to-head televised debate on governance.

options.text: Accept the debate challenge confidently, betting on superior command of facts.

risk.badOutcome: A few shaky answers during the live debate are clipped and shared widely.

options.text: Accept, but counter-propose a panel format with multiple parties rather than a head-to-head.
Decline, citing that sitting Chief Ministers traditionally don't debate one-on-one.

risk.badOutcome: The decline is mocked as dodging accountability.

options.text: Send a senior minister to debate on the government's behalf instead.

issueItems.title: The opposition's debate challenge to the CM is publicly declined
issueItems.description: Having thrown down a televised debate challenge to the Chief Minister, the opposition must now decide how hard to press the issue after a decline.

options.text: Keep pressing the issue loudly in every public statement and press conference.
Offer a smaller, regional debate format as a face-saving compromise.
Drop the issue quietly and move on to other campaign themes.
Hold a symbolic 'empty chair' event highlighting the CM's absence.

risk.badOutcome: The stunt is criticised as a gimmick rather than substantive politics.

issueItems.title: A satirical news site's fake headline about the government is mistaken for real news
issueItems.description: A well-known satire site's joke headline claiming a bizarre new government policy has been widely shared and mistaken as genuine news by many readers.

options.text: Clarify the truth in a light, humorous tone rather than a stern denial.
Issue a formal, serious denial clarifying it was satire.
Ignore it entirely, trusting people to eventually realise it was a joke.

risk.badOutcome: The fake headline keeps circulating among people who never realised it was satire.

options.text: Reach out to the satire site to add a clearer disclaimer for future pieces.

issueItems.title: A satirical news site's fake headline about the opposition is mistaken for real news

issueItems.title: The state's flagship investors summit closes with a flurry of signed deals

options.text: Focus messaging only on firm, concrete commitments made at the event.
Downplay the announcement until firmer commitments are confirmed.
Invite an independent body to verify and track the commitments made.

issueItems.title: The CM's birthday turns into a state-wide extravaganza
issueItems.description: Local party units, competing to outdo each other, have turned the Chief Minister's birthday into a massive, costly state-wide spectacle of banners and events.

options.text: Issue guidance asking units to keep celebrations modest and dignified.
Let local units celebrate as extravagantly as they wish, seeing it as enthusiasm.

risk.badOutcome: The lavish spending amid public welfare complaints draws sharp criticism.

options.text: Ask units to redirect celebration budgets into a charity drive instead.
Keep the day strictly private with no public events at all.

issueItems.title: The opposition leader's birthday turns into a lavish public spectacle

options.text: Issue guidance asking cadres to keep celebrations modest and dignified.
Let cadres celebrate as enthusiastically as they wish.

risk.badOutcome: The lavish spending looks awkward against the party's pro-poor messaging.

options.text: Ask cadres to redirect celebration budgets into a charity drive instead.
Keep the day strictly private with no public events at all.

issueItems.title: A viral video unfavourably compares the state to a neighbouring state

issueItems.title: A viral video favourably compares opposition-run municipalities to ruling-party ones

risk.badOutcome: Critics dig up a counter-example where the opposition-run body underperformed.

options.text: Commission a deeper, more rigorous comparative report to back up the claim.
Let the video spread on its own without official amplification.
Invite an independent body to verify the claims in the video.

issueItems.title: The CM makes a surprise unannounced visit to a remote village

balanceNotes.publicSupportScale: Routine monthly issues keep the original -5..+5 publicSupport range. Major/rare 'headline' events (defections, scandals, election results, celebrity joins, and the Vice President's death) are deliberately allowed wider swings -- up to roughly -6..+8 on publicSupport and partyMorale, and larger coin swings -- so they read as genuinely bigger moments than routine governance/organisation issues, instead of blending into the noise.
balanceNotes.deathOfVicePresidentPattern: Both gov_vice_president_death and opp_vice_president_death follow a deliberate, reliable pattern across all four options: partyMorale always drops (grief/leadership void), publicSupport always rises (sympathy wave), and coins always rise (condolence/memorial donations). Options vary the magnitude and the risk of overplaying the moment (e.g. alleging foul play swings support the most but carries the highest chance of a credibility-damaging backlash).
balanceNotes.optionVariety: New issues each carry a unique, scenario-specific set of four optionKeys instead of reusing the original eight boilerplate keys (strict_action/quick_relief/message_and_delay/protect_machinery for GOVERNMENT; constructive_service/aggressive_agitation/verify_and_attack/funds_first_compromise for OPPOSITION), so each headline event feels distinct to play through.
balanceNotes.secondExpansionSurprises: This batch leans into unpredictable 'surprise' event types per the request: rumours, game-show appearances, media bluffs/fake stories, on-camera goof-ups, deepfake video/audio, AI impersonation bots, mystery donor windfalls, business/investment opportunities, viral memes/dance trends, and satirical content. Most use routine -3..+3 swings to keep the deck readable turn to turn, with a handful of higher-variance 'spicy' options (deepfakes, mystery donors, viral fan clubs) carrying real upside alongside a meaningful chance of backfiring.
